objective: Add --scan-board vendor discovery: board pagination scanning, author filtering, queue orchestration.
non_goals: No end-to-end verification run (needs Ollama + Playwright available)
No multi-platform board support yet (only Ppomppu)

completed: Refactored CLI args into discriminated union (show-vendors | csv | scan-board).
gaps: No end-to-end verification run with --scan-board yet.
No unit tests for new modules yet.
Board scanner only supports Ppomppu board layout.

decisions: Board scanner uses plain fetch() with UA headers, not Crawlee CheerioCrawler — simpler, no Playwright needed.
Pagination follows '다음'/'next' links or page number links up to maxPages.
createBoardScanHandler also exported for CheerioCrawler mode if needed later.
Vendor filtering at board level: matches author name OR post title against vendorKey.
syncDatasetToSqlite() extracted from duplicated code — now shared between csv and scan-board modes.
Database type exported as `Db as Database` from better-sqlite3 re-export.
constraints: Manual execution only; no automated scheduler for competitor intel.
Do not log secrets or credentials.
JSONL output format must remain backward compatible.
next_actions: Session 4: Add unit tests for pure functions (parser, registry, validation, image-utils, board-scanner).
End-to-end: run --scan-board with a real board URL, verify discovered vendors match known posters.
End-to-end: run with same CSV as Session 2, compare JSONL output to pre-refactoring baseline.
practical_recommendations: Run: npx tsc --noEmit to verify TypeScript compilation.
Board scan test: npx tsx scripts/competitor-ads-intel.ts --scan-board "https://ppomppu.co.kr/bbs/board.php?bo_table=share" --max-pages 3 --vendor-key "shareplan"
See /parent/marketing-automation/.planning/spec-kit/refs/competitor-intel-roadmap.md for the full multi-session plan.
Crawlee stores data in local Dataset (SQLite-based at ./storage/datasets/default) — separate from competitor-ads.db.
